> _Verbatim cross-reference verdict (ours vs orsc vs Jagex ground truth) from the render-fidelity-cross-reference workflow (2026-06-01)._

# Render-diff tooling adjudication — area: dump/faces/pixel-CLI/JAR-oracle re-port onto orsc

**Framing reminder.** The Jagex rev-235 clean decompile is the arbiter. But note a crucial scoping fact for THIS area: the render-diff *tooling* (dump schema, faces export, pixel CLI, JAR oracle) is not itself a "render behavior" governed by the Jagex algorithm — it is the *apparatus that adjudicates* render behaviors. So for the tooling rows the question is not "does ours match Jagex" but "does the tool survive the orsc retarget and remain a valid harness for the orsc-vs-Jagex diff." The genuine ours-vs-orsc-vs-Jagex render-behavior verdicts live in the sibling areas (terrain/boundary/roof/scenery/diagobj); here I confirm those fixes are documented with clean-decompile cites and carried as forward-port obligations, and I specify the mechanical retarget.

## What our tooling is, and what it consumes

- `internal/rscdump/{schema.go,landscape.go}` — the `rscdump/1` L1 state schema (terrain grids + camera + window + entities/scenery/self/removals) and `Dump.Landscape()`, which scatters the dump grids into a `pathfind.Landscape` via `pathfind.SectorForWorld/TileLocalInSector`. This is engine-agnostic: it produces the SAME `*pathfind.Landscape` and `*facts.Facts` that the orsc renderer's `RenderView(land, f, …)` / `RenderBridge` already consume. **The dump leg is upstream of any renderer.**
- `render/dump.go` — `RenderDump`/`RenderDumpWith`: `Dump → *pathfind.Landscape (+ synthetic facts) → renderViewToSurface → (PNG, []int32 framebuffer)`, with `withDumpTerrainSeed` pinning the per-vertex ambience RNG, and `dumpView` projecting the dump onto the old `render.View`.
- `render/dump_faces.go` — `RenderDumpFaces`: builds the scene (`buildScene`) and walks every model's TRANSFORMED verts + per-face fills into `[]BuiltFace` keyed by `(rounded centroid XYZ, vertCount, fillFront, fillBack)` — the camera-independent structural-diff key.
- `cmd/renderdiff/{main.go,diff.go}` — the CLI: per-pixel max-channel diff + heatmap PNG, and the multiplicity-aware face-set asymmetric diff, with a `<name>.faces.json` (`rscdump-faces/1`) sidecar contract. Inputs are `.json` (rendered by the Go engine) or `.png` (decoded, optional faces sidecar) — the seam the DEOB/JAR engines plug into.
- JAR oracle (separate repo): `/home/free/code/rsc-hacking/rscplus/dumprender/DumpRenderer.java` — loads an `rscdump/1` L1 fixture, drives the obf rev-235 jar (reads `ua.rb` framebuffer → PNG; walks `lb.Z[0..ab-1]` → faces), and emits a PNG + `jar-door.faces.json` in the SAME `rscdump-faces/1` schema (`grid = 16` == `render.CentroidGrid`, fields `centroid/numVerts/fillFront`). Confirmed self-describing at DumpRenderer.java:11-39,247-290.

## The retarget seam (precise)

The orsc renderer's API surface is a clean drop-in for both legs:

- **PNG / framebuffer leg.** orsc `RenderView(land *pathfind.Landscape, f *facts.Facts, models, sprites, v render.View) → ([]byte PNG, err)` (`render/orsc/view.go:36`) and `RenderBridge(x,y,plane,rot,zoom,w,h)` (`harness.go`) already take exactly the `*pathfind.Landscape` that `Dump.Landscape()` produces and the `render.View` that `dumpView` produces. The framebuffer is `orsc.Surface.Pixels []int32` (0x00RRGGBB, row-major — types.go:211-216), byte-identical layout to our `render.Surface.Pix`. So `RenderDump` retargets to: `dump → Dump.Landscape() → orsc.RenderView(...) → surf.Pixels`. **One change:** orsc's `RenderView` returns only PNG; to also hand back the raw `[]int32` for the pixel diff, add a sibling that returns `surf.Pixels` (or have the harness copy `surf.Pixels` before `toImage`). The dump's `terrainSeed` RNG-pin (`withDumpTerrainSeed`) must be reproduced against orsc's terrain ambience source (orsc `world.go` build) — this is the one piece of `dump.go` that is renderer-internal and must be re-expressed, not just rewired.
- **Structural-faces leg.** `sceneFaces` walks `sc.Models`, calls `m.apply()` to bake transform into `tX/tY/tZ`, then per face reads `m.FaceVertices[fi]`, `m.FaceFillFront[fi]`, `m.FaceFillBack[fi]`. The orsc analogue is exact: `Scene.models[0..modelCount]`, bake via `(*Model).resetTransformCache()`, transformed verts in `vertXTransform/YTransform/ZTransform`, face verts in `faceIndices[fi]` (+ `faceIndexCount[fi]`), fills in `faceTextureFront/Back[fi]`, counts `faceHead`/`vertHead`. **Caveat:** these orsc fields + `resetTransformCache` are unexported, and orsc has NO scene-build-only entrypoint (its `RenderView` builds AND rasterizes in one call). So the retarget must live in-package (`render/orsc/dump_faces.go`) or orsc must export a `BuildScene(land,f,v) *Scene` + a `(*Model)` face accessor. The `BuiltFace`/`Key()`/`CentroidGrid` types stay in `render/` (or a neutral pkg) so the JAR-oracle schema contract is unchanged.
- **CLI.** `cmd/renderdiff/{main.go,diff.go}` only depends on `render.BuiltFace`/`render.RenderDump`/`render.RenderDumpFaces`. Point those three symbols at the orsc-backed equivalents (or a thin `renderdiff`-internal adapter) and the pixel diff, heatmap, structural diff, sidecar IO, and `.png` decode path are **unchanged**. The CLI is renderer-agnostic by construction.

## Complementarity vs the colleague harness (loud finding)

The orsc `harness.go`/`view.go` is a **PNG hook only**. It has:
- NO serializable state schema — `RenderBridge` takes loose `(x,y,plane,rot,zoom,w,h)` ints and `RenderView` takes a live `render.View`; neither loads/saves an `rscdump/1` blob. The deterministic, three-engine-shared input format is **only** in our `internal/rscdump`. (Verified: `git grep` of all orsc files for `rscdump|Dump|json|faces.json|BuiltFace` returns nothing but one unrelated `SceneryLocs.json` comment.)
- NO structural face diff — orsc never exports a `[]BuiltFace`; its model list is internal and rasterized immediately.
- NO pixel CLI — no per-pixel delta, no heatmap, no `.png` decode, no CI exit-code gate. That is entirely our `cmd/renderdiff`.
- NO JAR-oracle leg — the orsc harness diffs orsc-vs-our-render in PNG only; it has no path to the rev-235 jar. The independent ground-truth arbiter (`rscplus/dumprender/DumpRenderer.java`) is wired to the `rscdump/1` + `rscdump-faces/1` schemas, which are ours.

So the colleague harness and our tooling are **complementary, not redundant**: keep the orsc harness as the orsc PNG producer, and re-point our dump/faces/CLI/JAR-oracle apparatus at it. The JAR-oracle harness (separate rscplus repo) is **unaffected** — it consumes the schema, not any Go render symbol, so it remains the independent arbiter the moment the Go and orsc legs both emit `rscdump-faces/1`.

## Ground-truth arbiter status

The deob (`reference/rsc-client/src/client`) + clean decompile (`decompiled/normalized-clean/`) + the rev-235 jar remain the arbiter and are untouched by any of this. RENDER_DEOB_GAPS.md is candid that the deob is **not yet a trustworthy runtime oracle** (10 behavioral bugs incl. the systemic World↔Scene alias inversion, plus a compile gate), so for now the arbiter is exercised via (a) **source reading** of the clean decompile for the structural verdicts, and (b) the **JAR oracle** for the eventual pixel/struct runtime diff. Any orsc-vs-ours pixel disagreement that source reading cannot settle is `NEEDS-RUNTIME-DIFF`, to be resolved once the retargeted faces/CLI legs feed the jar oracle.

## Work-preserving integration

Drop ONLY the superseded `render/{terrain,boundary,roof,scenery,diagobj,render,scene,model,...}.go` source edits (the old-API renderer orsc replaces). PRESERVE and forward-port: all docs (`RENDER_FIDELITY_FINDINGS.md`, `RENDER_DEOB_GAPS.md`), all `testdata/rscdump/**` fixtures, the entire `internal/rscdump` schema, the entire `cmd/renderdiff` CLI, the JAR oracle, and the substance of the 8 APPLIED render fixes (each cited to the Jagex/deob source) — these become the orsc forward-port checklist verified against `render/orsc/{world,walls,roofs,scenery_place,...}.go`. The fidelity tests (`render/fidelity_*.go`) are tied to the old `RenderDumpFacesWith` API and must be retargeted alongside `dump_faces.go` (same one-line symbol swap), not deleted — they are the regression guards for the forward-ported fixes.

## VERDICTS

| behavior | OUR logic (file:line) | ORSC logic (file:line) | JAGEX ground truth | WINNER | ACTION | evidence |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| `rscdump/1` serializable shared-state schema (deterministic 3-engine input) | `internal/rscdump/schema.go:51-225`, `landscape.go:18-63` | absent (no dump load/save in any `render/orsc/*.go`) | n/a (apparatus, not a render algo) | ours | PORT-OURS-TO-ORSC-GAP | orsc consumes loose `render.View`/ints (`view.go:36`, `harness.go:RenderBridge`); grep of orsc for `rscdump\|Dump\|faces.json` finds none. `Dump.Landscape()` already yields the `*pathfind.Landscape` orsc.RenderView takes. |
| Dump→PNG + raw `[]int32` framebuffer leg | `render/dump.go:30-70` (`renderViewToSurface`→`Surface.Pix`) | `render/orsc/view.go:36-83` (PNG only, no raw buffer return) | n/a | ours (orsc-gap on raw buffer) | PORT-OURS-TO-ORSC-GAP | orsc `Surface.Pixels []int32` is byte-identical layout (types.go:211-216); retarget = `Dump.Landscape()→orsc.RenderView` + add raw-`Pixels` return. `withDumpTerrainSeed` RNG-pin (`dump.go:56`) must be re-expressed against orsc terrain build. |
| `dumpView`: dump → `render.View` (camera yaw/zoom, entities, removals) | `render/dump.go:78-140` | orsc consumes `render.View` directly (`view.go:36`); maps `yaw=Rotation*4`, `dist=Zoom*2` (`view.go:79`) | dump Camera is 0..1023 pre-inversion (schema.go:80-84) | agree | REDUNDANT-BOTH-CORRECT | both convert the same `render.View`; orsc's `*4`/`*2` matches dump's inverse (`dump.go:83-84`). Reusable verbatim. |
| Structural face export `[]BuiltFace` (transformed-centroid/verts/fills key) | `render/dump_faces.go:61-131` (`sceneFaces`: `apply()`→`tX/tY/tZ`, `FaceVertices`, `FaceFill*`) | absent (no face export; model list internal, rasterized inline) | n/a | ours | PORT-OURS-TO-ORSC-GAP | orsc field map is exact: `resetTransformCache`→`vertXTransform/Y/Z`, `faceIndices[fi]`, `faceTextureFront/Back[fi]`, `faceHead` (types.go:87-150, model.go:261-372). Fields unexported ⇒ retarget in-pkg `render/orsc/dump_faces.go` or export `BuildScene`+accessor. |
| `BuiltFace.Key()` / `CentroidGrid=16` structural identity | `render/dump_faces.go:25-47` (Key), `:38` (grid) | absent | n/a | ours | PORT-OURS-TO-ORSC-GAP | JAR oracle hardcodes the SAME `grid=16` and field names (DumpRenderer.java:249,282-284) — the schema is load-bearing across repos; keep `BuiltFace` type stable. |
| Per-pixel max-channel diff + LSB tolerance + bbox | `cmd/renderdiff/diff.go:67-105` | absent | n/a | ours | PORT-OURS-TO-ORSC-GAP | depends only on two `[]int32` buffers; renderer-agnostic. |
| Diff heatmap PNG | `cmd/renderdiff/diff.go:111-138` | absent | n/a | ours | PORT-OURS-TO-ORSC-GAP | pure buffer→PNG; unchanged by retarget. |
| `.png` decode (pre-rendered engine capture) | `cmd/renderdiff/diff.go:144-164` | absent | n/a | ours | PORT-OURS-TO-ORSC-GAP | the seam DEOB/JAR PNGs plug into; renderer-independent. |
| Structural asymmetric face-set diff (multiplicity-aware A-only/B-only) | `cmd/renderdiff/diff.go:184-225` | absent | n/a | ours | PORT-OURS-TO-ORSC-GAP | consumes `[]render.BuiltFace`; only the producer changes. |
| CLI driver + `rscdump-faces/1` sidecar IO + CI exit gate | `cmd/renderdiff/main.go:57-265` | absent | n/a | ours | PORT-OURS-TO-ORSC-GAP | depends on `render.RenderDump`/`RenderDumpFaces`/`BuiltFace` only — repoint those 3 symbols. |
| orsc PNG harness (live spectator + bridge render) | n/a (we have no orsc) | `render/orsc/{harness.go,view.go,doc.go}` | the renderer-under-test | orsc | ADOPT-ORSC | the orsc renderer is the new render-under-test; our tooling wraps it, not replaces it. |
